dialogues.text: Same items, two different pictures. What's going on here? Let's start with the one you know.
Let's warm up. Check out these bags. Build the equation.
Look at both of these pictures. They both show 15 items, 3 groups of 5. But something looks different about the one on the right. What do you see that's different?
You see it. Everything is lined up. Same groups, but organized so every item has a spot.
That lined-up arrangement? It has a name, and there's a lot to discover about how it works. Let's find out.
